name: Orange-Glazed Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the thinly sliced carrots, water, and salt in a crockpot.
2. Cover and cook on high for 2 to 3 hours or until tender.
3. Drain well; stir in the remaining ingredients (butter, orange marmalade, and chopped pecans).
4. Cover and cook on high for an additional 20 to 30 minutes.
